title: Test-Time Augmentation (TTA)
summary: At inference time, make predictions on multiple augmented versions of each test sample and average the probability outputs. A free accuracy boost that doesn't require retraining.
when_to_use: Always try it when the augmentation used during training can be applied at test time
Nearly free (2x inference cost for L-R flip TTA)
Diminishing returns with many augmentations — 2-4 variants is usually optimal
Stack with techniques/threshold-optimization for additional gains
